data.title: Sasseur REIT Rejects Xi’an Outlet Acquisition, Shifts Focus to Regional Diversification
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Sasseur Real Estate Investment Trust ( (SG:CRPU) ) is now available.

Sasseur REIT has declined an offer from its sponsor, Sasseur Cayman Holding Limited, to acquire the Sasseur (Xi’an) Outlets in China under an existing right of first refusal arrangement. The manager and trustee concluded that the proposed acquisition terms would not be accretive to distribution per unit and would materially dilute both DPU and net asset value per unit, running counter to the REIT’s objectives of sustaining long-term growth while maintaining a prudent capital structure. Instead, the manager intends to defer ROFR acquisitions in China for now and will focus on pursuing high-quality, DPU-accretive assets in South-East Asia and other selected markets, a strategic shift aimed at strengthening portfolio resilience, diversifying income sources, and delivering greater long-term value to unitholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:CRPU) stock is a Buy with a S$0.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sasseur Real Estate Investment Trust stock, see the SG:CRPU Stock Forecast page.

More about Sasseur Real Estate Investment Trust

Sasseur Real Estate Investment Trust is a Singapore-listed real estate investment trust focused on retail outlet malls, with a portfolio concentrated in the People’s Republic of China. Managed by Sasseur Asset Management Pte. Ltd., the REIT targets high-quality, income-generating commercial properties and is seeking to diversify into key growth markets, including South-East Asia and other compatible regions, to enhance long-term returns for unitholders.

Average Trading Volume: 1,000,069

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$863.2M

For a thorough assessment of CRPU stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: China International Development Raises HK$27 Million Through Share Placing to Bolster Working Capital
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from China International Development Corporation Limited ( (HK:0264) ).

China International Development Corporation Limited has completed a share placing under its general mandate, issuing 12,916,000 new shares at HK$2.16 each, representing about 2.72% of its enlarged share capital, to at least six independent placees. The placing raised net proceeds of approximately HK$27.14 million, which the company plans to allocate toward procurement and operating costs in its leather manufacturing and related cleaning services and trading businesses, general working capital such as rent, staff and professional fees, and repayment of outstanding indebtedness, thereby strengthening its financial position without any placee becoming a substantial shareholder or materially altering control, as Waterfront Holding Group’s stake is diluted slightly from 50.27% to 48.90%.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0264) stock is a Hold with a HK$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China International Development Corporation Limited stock, see the HK:0264 Stock Forecast page.

More about China International Development Corporation Limited

China International Development Corporation Limited operates businesses including leather manufacturing, extended cleaning services for leather and motor vehicle engines, and other trading activities, with a shareholder base that includes controlling shareholder Waterfront Holding Group Co., Ltd., wholly owned by Mr. Zhao Jingfei.

Average Trading Volume: 1,256,121

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$1.01B

Learn more about 0264 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Alleima Profits Hit by Weak Markets and Currency Headwinds but Presses On With Strategic Investments and Higher Dividend
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Alleima AB ( (SE:ALLEI) ).

Alleima reported a weak fourth quarter and full-year 2025, with order intake over the past 12 months down 9% and quarterly revenues falling 12%, as softer demand in industrial and chemical and petrochemical segments, particularly in Europe and North America, combined with significant negative currency effects and production constraints to compress margins and push quarterly earnings per share slightly negative. Despite lower profits and a reduced adjusted EBIT margin, the company highlighted robust free cash flow, a strong balance sheet and ongoing cost-cutting and efficiency measures, while pressing ahead with strategic capacity expansions in China, Sandviken and Malaysia and proposing a higher dividend, underscoring management’s confidence in Alleima’s long-term competitiveness and positioning in nuclear, medical and high-quality tube markets amid a turbulent macro environment.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:ALLEI) stock is a Hold with a SEK90.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alleima AB stock, see the SE:ALLEI Stock Forecast page.

More about Alleima AB

Alleima AB is an advanced materials and industrial engineering group focused on high-value tube products, heating solutions and specialty materials, with key end markets in industrial, chemical and petrochemical, nuclear power and medical applications. Its operations are geographically diversified, with significant exposure to Europe, North America and Asia, and it is investing in expanded manufacturing capacity in China, Sweden and Malaysia to support long-term growth in core segments such as nuclear and medical.

Average Trading Volume: 355,808

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK22B

SDAI ( (SG:5TI) ) has issued an update.

SDAI Limited has reported that there have been no further material developments in relation to the compulsory liquidation of its subsidiary KHL Marketing Asia-Pacific Pte. Ltd. that would significantly affect the group’s financial position since its last update. data.title: Laurion Extends High-Grade Polymetallic Mineralization at Ishkōday’s A-Zone/McLeod/CRK Corridor
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Laurion Mineral Exploration ( (TSE:LME) ) has issued an update.

Laurion Mineral Exploration reported new assay results from two fall 2025 diamond drill holes, LBX25-098 and LBX25-099, completed within the A-Zone/McLeod/CRK corridor at its Ishkōday Project in northwestern Ontario, returning several high-grade gold, silver and zinc intersections. The latest holes, drilled in an area with extensive historical and prior Laurion drilling, confirm structural continuity along a 1.4-kilometre mineralized corridor that hosts multiple zones of polymetallic mineralization, supporting an interpretation of a robust system comprising both broader, lower-grade envelopes and narrower, higher-grade intervals, and strengthening the project’s potential as a core focus area for the company’s ongoing exploration and resource-building efforts.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LME) stock is a Hold with a C$0.27 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Laurion Mineral Exploration stock, see the TSE:LME Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:LME Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:LME is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, recurring losses, and ongoing cash burn) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting this, recent corporate events are constructive—drill results and fresh flow-through funding to advance the 2026 program—while valuation support is limited due to a negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:LME stock, click here.

More about Laurion Mineral Exploration

Laurion Mineral Exploration Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on advancing its Ishkōday Project in the Beardmore–Geraldton Greenstone Belt of northwestern Ontario. The company targets polymetallic mineralization, primarily gold, silver, zinc and locally copper, through systematic diamond drilling and integrated geological and structural modelling to build geological confidence and support longer-term technical and strategic objectives.

Average Trading Volume: 82,378

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$76.65M

Metaplanet KK ( (JP:3350) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Metaplanet Inc. has set March 25, 2026, at 10 a.m. as the date and time for its 27th Annual General Meeting of Shareholders, to be held at Pia Arena MM in Yokohama, Kanagawa, with detailed agenda items to be announced later. Only shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025, will be eligible to attend, and the company plans to send a formal notice of convocation by mail, underscoring its adherence to standard governance and disclosure practices for listed companies.

data.title: Top Glove Top Executives Boost Stakes With RM2.38 Million Share Purchases
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Top Glove Bhd ( (TPGVF) ) has provided an announcement.

Top Glove Corporation Bhd disclosed that its Executive Chairman, Tan Sri Dr Lim Wee Chai, and Executive Director, Mr Lim Hooi Sin, each acquired 2 million ordinary shares in the company on 26 January 2026, at a total consideration of RM1.19 million per transaction, representing 0.025% of the company’s shares apiece. The off-closed-period insider purchases, involving both indirect and direct interests, signal continued confidence by top management in the group’s prospects and may be interpreted by investors as a supportive move for the stock’s valuation and market perception.

More about Top Glove Bhd

Top Glove Corporation Bhd is a Malaysian-listed manufacturer best known as one of the world’s largest producers of rubber gloves, supplying medical, industrial and household glove products to global markets. The company operates in the healthcare and protective equipment industry, with a strong export-oriented focus and a significant presence on Bursa Malaysia under the stock name TOPGLOV.

For an in-depth examination of TPGVF stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Tianjin Development Sells Entire Stake in Benefo Financial Leasing for RMB265 Million
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Tianjin Development Holdings ( (HK:0882) ) is now available.

Tianjin Development Holdings has agreed to dispose of its entire equity interest in Benefo Financial Leasing Co., Ltd. through its 82.74%-owned subsidiary Tianjin Tai Kang, which will sell 100% of Benefo Financial Leasing to Tianjin Capital for RMB264.93 million (approximately HK$294.37 million), based on an asset-based valuation as at 30 September 2025 and in compliance with PRC state-owned asset transfer rules. Following completion and the required regulatory and state-owned asset approvals, Benefo Financial Leasing will cease to be a subsidiary of the group, with Tianjin Capital assuming all profits and losses from 30 September 2025 to completion, marking an adjustment to Tianjin Development’s portfolio exposure to financial leasing while meeting Hong Kong Listing Rules disclosure requirements for a discloseable transaction.

More about Tianjin Development Holdings

Tianjin Development Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong–incorporated investment holding company with diversified operations through subsidiaries, including financial services activities conducted via entities such as Benefo Financial Leasing Co., Ltd. The group leverages its platform and state-owned enterprise affiliations to participate in regulated sectors in mainland China, including financial leasing and related asset-based financing services.

Average Trading Volume: 374,267

Current Market Cap: HK$2.8B

For a thorough assessment of 0882 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from Amati AIM ( (GB:MRV) ) is now available.

Maven Renovar VCT PLC has undertaken a share buy-back, purchasing 238,833 of its own ordinary shares for cancellation at 59p per share. Following the transaction, the company’s issued share capital stands at 141,685,419 ordinary shares of 5p each, all carrying one voting right, a figure that will now serve as the reference denominator for shareholders assessing disclosure obligations under the FCA’s transparency rules.
